title: The Crystalline Waters of a Hidden Beach

scenes.text: Stunning rock formations meet crystalline blue waters.
This is Playa de las Catedrales, located in Galicia, Spain.
The beach is famous for its stunning arches and natural rock formations.
Explore the beach at low tide for breathtaking views.
scenes.label: EXPLORE AT LOW TIDE

scenes.text: Follow to see the world's hidden places.

description: 📍 Playa de las Catedrales, Galicia - Spain. A breathtaking beach with stunning rock formations and crystalline waters, best visited at low tide. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
